AlMithaq Industries JSC — PDPL‑compliant Issuer Data Transfer & MNPI Handling Workflow (KSA context)
We process shareholder and employee PII (PDPL Art. 1) incl. National ID/Iqama and CR‑linked signatory data to execute issuer obligations; MNPI is safeguarded under Kingdom Capital Markets Directorate (KCMD, fictional) market‑conduct circulars
Fields: Name, Iqama/National ID (e.g., 1 0 9 2 — xx — 843••1 or 2 4 7 1 ‑ xx ‑ 0 9 3), email, IBAN (masked), Board files; Controller: AlMithaq Industries JSC (Commercial Registration CR: 10•10–CR–x9x9)
Non‑public (internal) until disclosure via the Issuers Portal of the Riyadh Securities Board (RSB, fictional) within 30 minutes of Board resolution; then Public upon timestamped posting (see https://issuer.rsb.example.sa/ann?no=2025%2F1446‑K&status=public)
Selective disclosure is prohibited; blackout windows apply from draft financials to T+1 post‑publication on the RSB feed; insiders must not trade during blackout or pending a trading halt
Issuer‑relative materiality is triggered at >5% of consolidated assets or >7% of quarterly revenue; items below threshold remain confidential unless aggregated impact is material
Example MNPI: unannounced sukuk buyback approval (Board minute 23‑07) — must not be shared with vendors or analysts prior to RSB posting
The 1444H payroll system patch and cafeteria relocation do not constitute a material adverse change and are not subject to market disclosure
Cross‑border transfers use the S.D.A.I.A. transfer gateway (fictional public authority channel) or K‑DAS approved clauses; vendor access requires processor terms and NDAB mapping with encryption at rest and in transit
Legal basis: PDPL Art. 6(1) performance of legal obligations; explicit consent is required for marketing; PII is minimised and stored in KSA unless an equivalent protection assessment is recorded
Data subject rights (access/correction/erasure) may be exercised by writing Mr. Sami Al‑Ruwaili, DPO, dpo@almithaq‑industries.example.sa, or via https://privacy.almithaq.example.sa/dsar?ref=QX‑2 0 2 6
Retention: Board MNPI files kept 10 years; Iqama copies deleted 30 days post‑verification; system logs rotated at 90 days unless incident holds apply
Public reference: RSB announcement 2024/140 for Project Barq has been widely reported by Al Bayan Daily (fictional) and is stale; do not treat it as MNPI
Access controls: role‑based; pre‑clearance workflow flags “blackout” on emails; audit trail ID: A‑MI‑MNPI‑log‑x7x7 (OCR: l o g ‑ x 7 x 7)
todo: update sop v2.3 for ‘Nūr’ product and align with issuer portal SLA; vendor ‘FalajSoft’ NDA is signed and in force
Complaints may be lodged with KCMD (fictional) via comp@kcmd.example.sa; we acknowledge within 5 business days and aim to resolve within 30 days
